name: GT-binomial-series
source: Real binomial series: sum_{k>=0} C(-1/2,k) t^k = (1-t)^(-1/2), absolutely convergent for |t|<1, with sum_k |C(-1/2,k)| |t|^k = (1-|t|)^(-1/2). PROVENANCE GAP: no standalone analysis source in refs/; currently leans on Kitaev's invocation of the Banach-algebra function calculus (refs/kitaev:354). Flagged for verifier.
